title: Branching and Merging Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Git branching and merging concepts.

questions.question: Which command is used to create a new branch in Git?
Which Git command is used to switch from one branch to another?
Regarding Git branching, which command is used to merge changes from one branch into another?
A situation where two or more transactions are waiting for each other to release a lock, resulting in a hang, is called a _______.
